decision.next_step: Stop heuristic retrieval/slot tuning; move to learned source/assignment-aware generation or a model-based critic.
decision.reason: No fixed slot policy improves match@50 and preserves Exp2o conversion simultaneously.

decision.next_step: Use the generated source-retrieval candidates only for slot-policy diagnostics; if no inference-safe slot policy passes, move to learned source/assignment-aware generation.
decision.reason: Deep source retrieval adds new sample-level matches and slightly improves match@50, but it does not preserve Exp2o conversion@50.
